creator: jamie@catflap.org
text:
(In reply to Bryan Drewery from comment #19)

I wasn't thinking of outbound, that would be too pedantic even for me :-) besides you could legitimately point out that the rc.conf settings are for the daemons.

No, I was thinking of inbound - if the keys already exist, and someone then sets openssh_xxx_enable=NO

then nothing changes.  xxx will still be enabled for sshd

Cheers, Jamie

P.S. Sorry if my original message appeared curt - it wasn't meant to.
